2_open_and_merge_gui_pr.additional_pr_reason: Smoke found prompt-run catalog executions were sent with version='latest', causing HTTP 422 because /api/execute expects an integer catalog version. Fixed in-flight by passing the resolved catalog playbook version.

3_restart_podman_and_kind.podman_status: Recovered through existing com.noetl.podman-machine LaunchAgent kickstart; podman machine noetl-dev and noetl-control-plane container running.

4_redeploy_gui.rollout_status: PASS: deployment/gui image ghcr.io/noetl/gui:v1.9.1 Ready 1/1; VITE_API_BASE_URL remained http://localhost:8082; VITE_APP_VERSION set to v1.9.1.

5_replay_lan_smoke.notes: LAN page loaded at http://192.168.1.240:30081/catalog. Runtime env still exposed localhost API base, but prompt/catalog API calls succeeded with no Network Error; /env-config.js and LAN /api/health verified. Browser screenshot capture failed twice due in-app browser CDP Page.captureScreenshot timeout.

render_evidence.button_callback_prompt_entry: echo widget-button-command -> unknown command: echo. type help

6_replay_widget_auto_render_smoke.notes: The render-emitting playbook started from the prompt, produced report/open buttons immediately, then appended the rendered widget entry without typing report. Clicking the app:button emitted the configured command into the prompt. The non-render probe completed without a spurious auto-render entry.

regressions_found.name: prompt-run catalog version 422
regressions_found.details: The new prompt `run` path resolved catalog playbooks but sent version='latest'. The v2 execute API rejected this with HTTP 422 because version must be an integer. Fixed in gui#28 by carrying the resolved catalog version through executePlaybookWithPayload.

notes: Primary GUI feature PR gui#27 released v1.9.0; smoke found one prompt-run integration bug, fixed by gui#28 and released/deployed as v1.9.1.

The bump_image playbook initially failed verify_images after rollout because a completed old GUI pod was still present; direct deployment verification showed the running deployment/pod on v1.9.1 Ready 1/1 after Kubernetes cleanup.
deferred_followups: Encode the LAN-routable env behavior into the helm chart so VITE_API_BASE_URL="" is the default (GUI then derives entirely from window.location)
Round 2.x form-submit semantics — let app:form / app:customform values seed a `run <playbook>` payload
Round 3: terminal-window unification with token cursor
